{{CargoRelic
|name=Sumo Wrestler Cert
|class_id=20010
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Yokozuna is the highest rank among sumo wrestlers. There won't be more than four Yokozuna wrestlers at any one time. A Yokozuna can't be demoted except for special circumstances. The title won't be denied unless the wrestler retires, but the salary will always stay unchanged. Yamato people worship the Yokozuna!
|fame=11
|art=21
|fth=14
|civ=28
|tech=16
|ss1=In Snail Arena, Snail HP +160<br>In Snail Arena, Snail ATK +16
|ss2=In Snail Arena, Snail HP +320<br>In Snail Arena, Snail ATK +32
|ss3=In Snail Arena, Snail HP +480<br>In Snail Arena, Snail ATK +48
|ss4=In Snail Arena, Snail HP +480<br>In Snail Arena, Snail ATK +48
|ss7=In Snail Arena, Snail HP +480<br>In Snail Arena, Snail ATK +48<br> (Awakened)
}}
